descriptionTemplate: Aurita gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Gain 1 Tentacle, and add 2 {Gland Division} into hand. When Aurita deals DMG, have [Arg2] Tentacles attack once.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Aurita gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Gain 1 Tentacle, and add 2 {Gland Division} into hand. When Aurita deals DMG, have [Arg2] Tentacles attack once. Aurita's "Strike" deals {Pierce DMG} and attack +2 times.
